---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What creator outcome do you want?**
Describe what you want to be able to do, not how to implement it.

Example: "I want to describe a character's emotion and have it reflected in their posture across panels."

**How are you working around this today?**

**Who else would benefit from this?**
- [ ] Indie filmmakers
- [ ] Screenwriters
- [ ] Game narrative designers
- [ ] Animation enthusiasts
- [ ] Brand creative directors

**Any other context or screenshots?**
